build.beforeDevCommand: cmd /c "cd ..\backend && ..\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000 &" && cmd /c "cd ..\netease-service && node server.js &" && cmd /c "cd ..\frontend-new && npm run dev"

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:3001 http://localhost:3002 http://localhost:8000 http://localhost:8080 ws://localhost:3001; img-src 'self' data: https: http:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; media-src 'self' https: http:
